$comment: DataCite Metadata Schema 4.4 (JSON representation) for the software deposit — no equivalent record previously existed in ../METADATA.md; added alongside it as Record 4. Identifier is a real Zenodo Sandbox DOI, reserved (not published) 2026-07-13 per ROADMAP.md Phase 9.2 — it does not resolve on real doi.org.

titles.title: nyc311-weather: notebooks and pipeline for the NYC 311 & Weather (2025) MoSD exam project

publisher: Zenodo Sandbox (test deposit — not a real/published record)

resourceType.resourceType: Jupyter notebooks (data acquisition, quality assessment, integration, analysis)

descriptions.description: 6 numbered notebooks (00_download through 05_analysis) plus documentation-generation scripts (e.g. build_fig07_provenance_diagram.py); pinned dependencies in requirements.txt. See ../../README.md for the full repository layout.

relatedIdentifiers.$comment: The companion data deposit (record_analysis_daily.json) generated by this code.
